=== bd1992-11-11_clearwater.txt
===================
===================
===================
Bob Dylan, 11/11/92, Clearwater, Florida, Ruth Eckerd Hall, 2CDR

fixed version of LB-5046, (80min+25min), Unknown Audience>CDR>EAC>FLAC LEVEL 5; bittorrent download 06/07; abrupt shakey start d1t1 with first 4 seconds from a different source or mics not set up yet; end of d1t9 and d1t14 and d2t1 cut; excellent sound [A-]

These are the tweaks I did (in Goldwave):

removed small gap at beg of d1t2
removed small gap at beg of d1t3, d1t4
removed small gap before d1t10
removed small gap at beg of d1t13
d1t14 is cut at the end

added fade-out on d2

there are still som pops and the likes on some cuts, but a better listen without the gaps

discontinuity pop d1t2 0:23, d1t5 3:27, d1t6 1:15, 3:08; d1t11 4:47, d1t14 3:06, 4:13; d2t1 4:58; d2t2 1:39, 1:53. 3:08; analog drops d1t2 2:11; d1t3 1:0, 1:08

CD 1 79:18, 1 Rainy Day Women # 12 & 35, 2 I Dreamed I Saw St. Augustine, 3 All Along The Watchtower, 4 Positively 4th Street, 5 Disease Of Conceit, 6 Drifter's Escape, 7 Silvio (Bob Dylan & Robert Hunter), 8 Mama, You Been On My Mind, 9 Boots Of Spanish Leather, 10 The Lonesome Death Of Hattie Carroll, 11 Girl From The North Country, 12 Everything Is Broken, 13 Senor (Tales Of Yankee Power), 14 When I Paint My Masterpiece, 

CD 2 24:03, 1 Maggie's Farm, 2 Shooting Star, 3 Highway 61 Revisited, 4 Blowin' In The Wind
